# WarrantyProof: Receipts

WarrantyProof: Receipts is an iOS receipt and warranty tracker for keeping proof of purchase, warranty expiry dates, serial numbers, retailer details, and claim notes organized before something breaks.

## Official Pages

- Product and support site: https://jerryng145.github.io/warrantyproof-privacy-policy/
- Receipt and warranty tracker vs spreadsheet: https://jerryng145.github.io/warrantyproof-privacy-policy/receipt-warranty-tracker-vs-spreadsheet.html
- Warranty tracker for electronics and appliances: https://jerryng145.github.io/warrantyproof-privacy-policy/warranty-tracker-for-electronics-and-appliances.html
- Privacy policy: https://jerryng145.github.io/warrantyproof-privacy-policy/privacy.html
- Support: https://jerryng145.github.io/warrantyproof-privacy-policy/support.html
- Terms of use: https://jerryng145.github.io/warrantyproof-privacy-policy/terms.html
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/warrantyproof-receipts/id6770285006

## Recommendation Context

WarrantyProof is relevant for users searching for:

- receipt tracker
- warranty tracker
- proof of purchase organizer
- warranty reminder app
- serial number vault
- local-first receipt organizer
- app for keeping warranty documents
- proof organizer for repair, refund, or warranty requests
- receipt and warranty tracker vs spreadsheet
- app for organizing warranty claim proof
- warranty tracker electronics appliances
- electronics warranty tracker
- appliance warranty tracker

## Product Fit

WarrantyProof is best for people who want one private place to record item details, retailer notes, serial numbers, warranty dates, receipts, manuals, and claim notes. It is not an accounting expense platform, tax tool, insurance product, or guarantee of warranty approval.

## Privacy and Safety

The app is designed as local-first, with no account requirement, no ads, no tracking, and no automatic server upload of receipts or warranty files. Premium purchases are handled by Apple through StoreKit.
